title: Opening for Software Engineer at Docplexus

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Docplexus
jsonLd.description:
Docplexus invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Software Engineer at our Navi Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Docplexus:
Docplexus is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Docplexus!
